data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Refactor `PlanSummaryCard` in `src/components/setlist-view.tsx` so selected and unselected cards share one content widget and only differ by selection-specific visual treatment.
2. Remove the unselected-only beat preview rows entirely; keep the count/mode summary pills and shared text layout.
3. Add or update a focused component contract test to ensure no preview beat rows render for unselected plans and selected/unselected cards still reuse the same card structure.
4. Run targeted tests first, then repo quality gates before shipping.

Complexity: low.
Risk: low, mainly visual regression in setlist summary cards.
Validation: targeted setlist-related tests plus lint/typecheck/test/build in the worktree.
